title: web_fetch SSRF guard is prefix-match — bypassed by DNS rebinding, hostnames, decimal IPs
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dim: Security. File: src/web.rs:15-49. validate_url's string-prefix check on host is unsound. Bypasses: (1) hostnames not matching IP prefix ('metadata.google.internal'); (2) DNS rebinding between validate and send; (3) decimal-encoded IPv4 'http://2130706433/' = 127.0.0.1; (4) IPv6 coverage missing ULA fc00::/7, link-local fe80::/10, IPv4-mapped ::ffff:127.0.0.1; (5) starts_with('172.2') matches public 172.200.x and blocks public 172.30.x. Refactor: resolve hostname with trust-dns-resolver at connect time, validate each IpAddr against ip_network IANA special-purpose registry, use custom reqwest resolver to re-check at dial-time. Explicitly block cloud metadata endpoints. Add regression tests for decimal IPv4 and metadata.google.internal.
